meta.notes: Manual evidence gathering to seed autoresearch loop after iter_001 found zero demand evidence

signals.topic: Verifiable AI Model Provenance for Trust Decisions

signals.title: Microsoft Agent Governance Toolkit
signals.snippet: AI Agent Governance Toolkit -- Policy enforcement, zero-trust identity, execution sandboxing, and reliability engineering for autonomous AI agents. Covers 10/10 OWASP Agentic Top 10.

signals.title: Agent Identity Protocol (AIP) - Open Source IAM for AI
signals.snippet: Agent Identity Protocol - Zero-trust security layer for AI agents. Policy enforcement proxy for MCP with Human-in-the-Loop approval, DLP scanning, and audit logging.

signals.title: ZeroID: Autonomous Agent Identity Management System
signals.snippet: Identity infrastructure for autonomous agents: issues cryptographically verifiable credentials, enforces delegated authority through chains of agents, revokes access in real time.

signals.title: Open Agent Passport (OAP) Spec
signals.snippet: Real-time enforcement of what agents are allowed to do at the point of action. Traditional identity verification answers who built an agent, but we need something more.

signals.title: Agent Integrity Protocol - Supply Chain Security for Agentic Web
signals.snippet: Enforcing Identity, Integrity, and Least Privilege for AI Tools. Every AI skill declares upfront what it will access.

signals.title: Verified Agent Identity (Billions Network) - DID-based
signals.snippet: Enables AI agents to create, manage, link, prove and verify ownership of decentralized identities (DIDs) using cryptographic signatures.

signals.title: SuperAGI Issue #1506: AgentID for autonomous agent identity
signals.snippet: Feature request for AgentID for autonomous agent identity and authentication.

signals.title: IETF draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-01 - AI Agent Authentication and Authorization
signals.snippet: Proposes authentication and authorization model for AI agent interactions leveraging WIMSE architecture and OAuth 2.0. OpenAI added as co-author.

signals.title: IETF Credential Broker for Agents (CB4A)
signals.snippet: Credential vaulting and brokering architecture that mediates AI agent access to API credentials. Agents receive short-lived, narrowly scoped, auditable proxy credentials.

signals.title: IETF draft-yao-agent-auth-considerations - OAuth Extension for Agent Auth
signals.snippet: Further considerations on AI Agent Authentication and Authorization Based on OAuth Extension.

signals.title: IETF draft-ni-a2a-ai-agent-security-requirements
signals.snippet: Security Requirements for AI Agents -- formal IETF draft defining security baseline.

signals.title: Web Bot Auth IETF Working Group (Cloudflare + Google)
signals.snippet: IETF Working Group chartered early 2026 by Cloudflare's Thibault Meunier and Google's Sandor Major. HTTP Message Signatures for automated traffic. Milestones targeting April 2026.

signals.title: NIST NCCoE Concept Paper: Software and AI Agent Identity and Authorization
signals.snippet: Proposes demonstration of identity standards applied to AI agents in enterprise settings. Standards under consideration: MCP, OAuth 2.0/2.1, OpenID Connect, SPIFFE/SPIRE, SCIM, NGAC. Comment period closed April 2, 2026.

signals.title: NIST AI Agent Standards Initiative
signals.snippet: Formal NIST initiative for AI agent standards.

signals.title: NIST Concept Paper PDF
signals.snippet: Full PDF of the concept paper on agent identity and authorization.

signals.title: Microsoft Entra Agent ID - What is the Agent Identity Platform
signals.snippet: Microsoft's agent identity platform built on OAuth 2.0 and OIDC. Secure, standards-based authentication for agents. First-class identity and access management for AI agents.

signals.title: Governing Agent Identities (Preview) - Microsoft Entra ID Governance
signals.snippet: Governance framework for agent identities: inventorying agents, assigning ownership, governing access with same rigor as human identities.

signals.title: Four priorities for AI-powered identity and network access security in 2026
signals.snippet: Microsoft's security blog laying out 2026 identity priorities including AI agent identity.

signals.title: Copilot Studio auto-creates Entra agent identities (preview)
signals.snippet: Copilot Studio automatically creates Microsoft Entra agent identity for each new agent. Agent uses identity for chat, connecting to SharePoint/Dataverse, with full Entra ID audit logging.

signals.title: Visa Introduces Trusted Agent Protocol
signals.snippet: Open framework for safe agent-driven checkout. Helps merchants distinguish between malicious bots and legitimate AI agents. Partners: Cloudflare, Adyen, Ant International, Checkout.com, Coinbase, CyberSource, Elavon, Fiserv, Microsoft, Nuvei, Shopify, Stripe, Worldpay.

signals.title: Visa and Partners Complete Secure AI Transactions
signals.snippet: Hundreds of secure agent-initiated transactions completed. 100+ partners worldwide, 30+ building in VIC sandbox, 20+ agents integrating directly with Visa Intelligent Commerce.

signals.title: Visa Intelligent Commerce - Setting Stage for 2026 Mainstream Adoption
signals.snippet: 2025 will be the final year consumers shop alone. 2026 AI agents complete purchases powered by Visa global scale. Pilots in APAC and Europe early 2026.

signals.topic: Mastercard Agent Pay and Verifiable Intent

signals.title: Mastercard Unveils Agent Pay
signals.snippet: Agentic payments technology requiring trusted AI agents to be registered and verified. On-device biometrics for strong consumer authentication.

signals.title: Mastercard Agentic Token Framework
signals.snippet: Agentic token framework for driving trusted AI transactions.

signals.title: Mastercard Verifiable Intent - Open Standard for Agent Transactions
signals.snippet: Open-source, standards-based framework designed for agentic commerce. Verifying agent legitimacy, strengthening authentication, reducing fraud, capturing intent.

signals.title: Mastercard + PayPal Agentic Commerce Partnership
signals.snippet: Mastercard and PayPal join forces for secure global agentic commerce.

signals.title: Mastercard contributing to FIDO Payments Working Group
signals.snippet: Contributing to FIDO Payments Working Group to define how verifiable credentials authenticate agent and consumer interactions. Portable, privacy-preserving, aligned with global standards.

signals.topic: Google A2A and Agent Payments Protocol (AP2)

signals.title: Google Agent Payments Protocol (AP2)
signals.snippet: Open protocol for secure agent-led payments across platforms. 60+ partners including Mastercard, AmEx, UnionPay. Extension of A2A and MCP protocols.

signals.title: A2A Protocol - 150+ Organizations at One-Year Mark
signals.snippet: 150+ organizations supporting A2A. Deep integration across Google, Microsoft, AWS. Production deployments in supply chain, financial services, insurance, IT operations.

signals.title: Google x402 + AP2 Integration with Coinbase
signals.snippet: A2A solves interoperability; AP2 solves authorization, intent binding and audit trail for money movement.

signals.title: Coinbase Agentic Wallets Launch
signals.snippet: First wallet infrastructure built specifically for AI agents. Autonomous spending, earning, trading with built-in security guardrails. x402 protocol with 50M+ transactions.

signals.title: World (Worldcoin) AgentKit with x402 for Human Verification Behind Agents
signals.snippet: World launches agentkit with Coinbase-backed x402 to verify human identity behind AI agents.

signals.title: WorkOS FGA: The Authorization Layer for AI Agents
signals.snippet: Resource-scoped authorization built for AI agents and machine-speed access patterns. Extends RBAC with hierarchical, resource-level permissions and explicit agent credentials. Millions of authz requests/sec.

signals.title: better-auth Agent Auth Protocol
signals.snippet: Open-source standard for AI agent authentication, capability-based authorization, and service discovery. Addresses delegated agents, credential sharing, and service advertisement.

signals.title: OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications 2026
signals.snippet: 100+ industry experts. 3 of top 4 risks (ASI02, ASI03, ASI04) revolve around identities, tools, and delegated trust boundaries. ASI03: agents need their own identities with task-scoped, time-bound permissions.

signals.title: OWASP Agentic Top 10 and Non-Human Identities
signals.snippet: Maps Agentic Top 10 directly to OWASP Top 10 for Non-Human Identities. Over-privileged NHIs, secret exposure, vulnerable third-party NHIs, long-lived credentials as root causes.

signals.title: CoinDesk: AI Agents Need Identity and ZKPs Are the Solution
signals.snippet: ZKPs allow verification without surveillance. Systems where users control data, verification doesn't require surveillance, humans and AI agents interact securely without sacrificing autonomy.

signals.title: Know Your Agent (KYA): The 2026 Shift in AI & Crypto
signals.snippet: Know Your Agent paradigm emerging in 2026 combining AI identity verification with crypto commerce.

signals.title: ZK-ACE: Identity-Centric Zero-Knowledge Authorization for Post-Quantum Blockchain
signals.snippet: Identity-centric zero-knowledge authorization system for post-quantum blockchain systems.

signals.title: Zero-Trust Identity Framework for Agentic AI (arXiv)
signals.snippet: Novel zero-trust identity framework with decentralized authentication and fine-grained access control for agentic AI.

signals.title: ISACA: The Looming Authorization Crisis - Why Traditional IAM Fails Agentic AI
signals.snippet: 63% of organizations cannot enforce purpose limitations on their AI agents. They know what agents should do but cannot technically prevent other actions.

signals.title: Machine Identity Management Market - $21.39B in 2026
signals.snippet: Global machine identity management market projected at USD 21.39 billion in 2026. 60% cloud-based deployments. 60% of cybersecurity experts consider machine identities higher risk than human identities.

signals.title: Gartner IAM Summit 2026: Identity Expanded Faster Than Programs Did
signals.snippet: Gartner IAM Summit 2026 theme: identity expanded faster than most programs could keep up.

signals.title: Strata: A New Identity Playbook for AI Agents in 2026
signals.snippet: New identity playbook required - AI agents are not just non-human identities. Distinct category requiring new approaches.

signals.topic: Enterprise Agent Spending and Authorization Stats

signals.title: Delegated Economies: When AI Agents Start Spending for Us
signals.snippet: Authorization becomes a policy -- users approve a decision space not a transaction. Delegated commerce requires adaptive control: dynamic guardrails adjusting to risk, context, behavioral signals.

signals.title: Privacy.com: AI Agent Payment Solutions in 2026 Compared
signals.snippet: Comparison of AI agent payment solutions available in 2026.

signals.title: KPMG: AI at Scale - Agent-Driven Enterprise Reinvention in 2026
signals.snippet: 67% of business leaders maintain AI spending even in recession. $124M projected per-company AI deployment. Agentic AI: 10-15% of IT spending in 2026.

signals.title: Arcade.dev: State of AI Agents 2026 - 5 Enterprise Trends
signals.snippet: State of AI Agents 2026: 5 trends shaping enterprise adoption including authorization as key challenge.
